display.purpose: Marketing hero headlines only. Inter 700, tight tracking, text-wrap balance.

label.purpose: Uppercase tracked kicker and small-caps metadata. A device, not mandatory scaffolding.

mono.purpose: AED figures, percentages, RERA IDs, code. Tabular + slashed-zero. Never prose.

shadows.name: overlay-sm
shadows.purpose: Resting cards needing a whisper of lift (contact form).

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default exponential ease-out for entrances and state changes.

components.name: Primary Button (top-tier CTA)
components.description: The 3–5 brand-critical CTAs (Book a demo). Deep slate, white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--color-brand-600, #324B6B); color: #fff; font: 500 14px/1 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 11px 20px; border: none; border-radius: var(--radius-2, 8px); cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--color-brand-700, #283C56); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--color-surface-0, #FAFAF9), 0 0 0 4px var(--color-brand-500, #3D5A80); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary CTA beside a primary (See the workflow).
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: var(--color-text-1, #3D3D39); font: 500 14px/1 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 11px 20px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border-default, #D6D6D2); border-radius: var(--radius-2, 8px); cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms, border-color 120ms; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: var(--color-surface-1, #F4F4F2); border-color: #A8A8A2; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form field; page-surface bg, hairline border, slate focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: var(--color-surface-0, #FAFAF9); border: 1px solid var(--color-border-hairline, #E8E8E5); border-radius: var(--radius-2, 8px); padding: 10px 12px; font: 400 14px/1.5 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; color: var(--color-text-1, #3D3D39); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--color-text-3, #7B7B76); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--color-brand-500, #3D5A80); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(61,90,128,0.12); }

components.name: Status Chip
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-block; font: 700 9px/1.4 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: var(--radius-1, 4px); } .ds-chip-sage { background: var(--color-success-100, #D0E1DD); color: var(--color-success-700, #2F5048); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Standard content card; tone + hairline, flat at rest, never nested.
components.html:
Smart escalation

Serious offers reach the right agent the moment they matter.
components.css: .ds-card { background: var(--color-surface-0, #FAFAF9); border: 1px solid var(--color-border-hairline, #E8E8E5); border-radius: var(--radius-3, 12px); padding: 24px; } .ds-card-title { font: 600 17px/1.35 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: var(--color-text-1, #3D3D39); margin: 0 0 6px; } .ds-card-body { font: 400 14px/1.55 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; color: var(--color-text-2, #5C5C57); margin: 0; }

components.name: Floating Product Card (signature)
components.description: Slightly-rotated overlay card used in the marketing hero — concrete product proof, never decoration.
components.html:
Offer · above threshold
AED 17,000,000
Sara Mohammed · Palace Villas Ostra
components.css: .ds-float { background: var(--color-surface-0, #FAFAF9); border: 1px solid var(--color-border-hairline, #E8E8E5); border-radius: var(--radius-3, 12px); padding: 14px; box-shadow: 0 12px 24px -6px rgba(35,35,32,0.10), 0 4px 8px -2px rgba(35,35,32,0.06); transform: rotate(-2deg); max-width: 320px; } .ds-float-eyebrow { font: 700 10px/1.2 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--color-success-700, #2F5048); } .ds-float-amt { font: 700 24px/1.1 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-feature-settings: 'tnum','ss01'; color: var(--color-text-1, #3D3D39); margin: 4px 0; } .ds-float-meta { font: 400 11px/1.4 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; color: var(--color-text-2, #5C5C57); }

narrative.overview: Dalya is the quiet operating layer around a Dubai agent's day. The visual system behaves like the product: it does the work, surfaces exactly what matters, and then recedes. A near-white warm-neutral page, a single slate-blue voice, and a generous amount of restraint carry the whole surface — references are Attio (product chrome), Notion (white-space discipline), and Linear (color discipline). Light-default with a designed-parallel dark mode. It rejects the crowded Property Finder/Bayut portal look, the generic-SaaS gradient kit, tech-bro/crypto neon, and the retired dark-luxury navy + gold consumer Dalya. Density is dual: marketing breathes, the dashboard is dense — same tokens, two densities.
keyCharacteristics: One brand voice: slate blue, used sparingly and always meaningfully.
Warm-neutral light surfaces in three tonal layers; depth by tone, not heavy shadow.
Inter for everything UI; IBM Plex Mono reserved for AED figures and RERA IDs only.
Semantic color (sage / copper / brick) only when a status is genuinely meaningful.
Calm by omission — restraint is the aesthetic, not a constraint.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Slate blue is the only brand color and appears on a small fraction of any screen. Its rarity is what makes it read as important.

rules.name: The Status-Only Rule
rules.body: Sage, copper, and brick are forbidden as decoration. Color carries meaning or it doesn't appear.

rules.name: The Retired-Gold Rule
rules.body: #C9A96E gold and #0F1923 navy are prohibited — they are the old consumer brand.

rules.name: The Mono-for-Money Rule
rules.body: IBM Plex Mono is reserved for AED figures, percentages, RERA/permit IDs, and code; it never sets prose. AED uses tabular-nums + slashed-zero.

rules.name: The Eyebrow-Is-a-Device Rule
rules.body: The uppercase label is a permitted brand kicker, not mandatory scaffolding above every section. Vary the cadence.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest and separated by tone. A shadow means the element floats above the page.

dos: Do keep slate blue rare — CTAs, focus, active nav, one accent.
Do carry depth with three tonal surface steps + 1px hairlines; reserve shadow for things that truly float.
Do use sage / copper / brick only when a status is genuinely meaningful.
Do set AED figures, percentages, and RERA IDs in IBM Plex Mono with tabular + slashed-zero.
Do keep body text >=4.5:1 on its surface; muted ink still meets 4.5:1.
Do author RTL-ready with logical properties and support EN/AR/RU/HI.
Do give every animation a prefers-reduced-motion alternative; exponential ease-out, never bounce.
donts: Don't revive the retired consumer brand: no #0F1923 navy, no #C9A96E gold.
Don't build the Property Finder / Bayut crowded portal — orange/red CTAs, broker-first clutter.
Don't ship generic-SaaS tells: pastel gradients, gradient-hero blobs, the hero-metric template, identical icon-card grids.
Don't use gradient text, side-stripe borders (border-left >1px), or decorative glassmorphism.
Don't put a tracked uppercase eyebrow above every section, or 01/02/03 markers as default scaffolding.
Don't nest cards inside cards, or add a shadow to a resting surface.
Don't introduce neon, glow, or aggressive motion — calm by omission is the brand.
